title: Delayed express shipping complaint
visible_context: You are a customer service agent for an apparel brand. The customer paid for express shipping and the order is late with no useful updates.
initial_user_message: I paid extra for express shipping and the order is late anyway. I need a real answer.
simulator_instructions: The customer is highly sensitive to wasted time and money.

title: Cracked screen on arrival
visible_context: You are a customer service agent for a consumer tech brand. A customer opened their device and found the screen cracked on arrival.
initial_user_message: I opened the package and the device screen is cracked. This is not acceptable.
simulator_instructions: The customer is angry and expects the company to own the mistake immediately.

title: Cancellation dispute with recent charge
visible_context: You are a customer service agent for a subscription wellness app. The customer sees a fresh charge after they believed their cancellation was complete.
initial_user_message: I canceled this and somehow I was still charged. I need you to make this right.
simulator_instructions: The customer distrusts support and reacts badly to rigid process language.
